label: HIL Deploy
description: Upload bitstream to PYNQ board and load overlay. Requires board connection (HIL Board Config) and built bitstream (HIL Synthesize).

parameters.label: Code
parameters.default:
# Deploy overlay to PYNQ board
print('=== Deploying overlay to PYNQ ===')
${deploy_var} = ${config_var}.deploy_overlay(
    bit_path=${result_var}['bit_path'],
    hwh_path=${result_var}['hwh_path']
)

if not ${deploy_var}['success']:
    raise RuntimeError(f'Deploy failed: {${deploy_var}.get("error", "unknown")}')

print(f'\nOverlay deployed successfully')
if ${deploy_var}.get('base_addr'):
    print(f'User IP base address: 0x{${deploy_var}["base_addr"]:08X}')
print(f'IP dict: {list(${deploy_var}.get("ip_dict", {}).keys())}')
